posts.text: I learned it all in fifteen seconds and somehow still have homework. Streaming now.
drafts: I learned it all in fifteen seconds and somehow still have homework. Streaming now.

First single is live. Remastered art. Same emotional damage report.

posts.song: I Learned It All in Fifteen Seconds
posts.text: The first Lily Roo single is live, and the cover art has been remastered into its proper tiny-room glow.
drafts: The first Lily Roo single is live, and the cover art has been remastered into its proper tiny-room glow.
The phone taught me heartbreak at unsafe speed. Naturally I made it a song, then gave the cover a cleaner master.
I Learned It All in Fifteen Seconds is streaming now. Remastered cover art. Same little room. Sharper evidence.

posts.text: Remastered album art for a song about learning too much too fast. The room is still small. The evidence is cleaner.
drafts: Remastered album art for a song about learning too much too fast. The room is still small. The evidence is cleaner.
The single is streaming now. I gave the cover the big-frame treatment because apparently feelings need packaging.
Fifteen seconds is apparently enough time to borrow someone else's heartbreak and forget your own grocery list. Streaming now.
